title: Brazilian Stir Fry Noodles
description: A quick and delicious stir fry dish made with noodles, rice, and various ingredients.
instructions: Cook the saffron rice according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and stir-fry until softened.
Add the carrots and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the fermented tofu and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the Brazilian stir fry sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Combine the cooked rice and noodle mixture.
